pr_title: SDLC-63: Fix case-insensitive origin flight search
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix flight origin search so lowercase airport codes match uppercase-stored airport codes.

## What changed
- Normalize origin input inside `search_flights`
- Add a regression test for lowercase origin queries

## Why
`GET /flights/search?origin=ath` was returning no results even when flights existed for `ATH`.

## Validation
- Added regression coverage for lowercase origin input
- Confirmed uppercase origin search remains supported
- Verified the change is localized to flight search origin matching
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
